apiserver_request_duration_seconds.help: Response latency distribution in seconds for each verb, resource and subresource.

apiserver_response_size_bytes.help: Response size in bytes for each verb, resource and subresource.

container_cpu_usage_seconds_total.help: Cumulative cpu time consumed in seconds.

coredns_dns_request_duration_seconds.help: Histogram of the time each request took.

coredns_dns_requests_total.help: Counter of DNS requests made per zone, protocol and family.

coredns_health_request_duration_seconds.help: Histogram of the time each request to the health endpoint took.

etcd_disk_backend_commit_duration_second.help: The latency distributions of commit called by backend.

etcd_disk_wal_fsync_duration_seconds.help: The latency distributions of fsync called by WAL.

kube_deployment_spec_replicas.help: Number of desired pods for a deployment.

kube_deployment_status_replicas_availabl.help: The number of available replicas per deployment.

kube_horizontalpodautoscaler_status_curr.help: Current number of replicas of pods managed by this autoscaler.

kube_horizontalpodautoscaler_status_desi.help: Desired number of replicas of pods managed by this autoscaler.

kube_node_status_condition.help: The condition of a cluster node.

kube_pod_container_status_restarts_total.help: The number of container restarts per container.

kube_pod_container_status_terminated_rea.help: Describes the reason the container is currently in terminated state.

kubelet_volume_stats_available_bytes.help: Number of available bytes in the volume.

kubelet_volume_stats_capacity_bytes.help: Capacity in bytes of the volume.

node_cpu_seconds_total.help: Seconds the CPUs spent in each mode.

scheduler_pod_scheduling_attempts.help: Number of attempts to successfully schedule pods.

scheduler_scheduling_attempt_duration_se.help: Scheduling attempt duration in seconds (e.g. scheduling algorithm latency)
